mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO news_data_none (crawler_id, title, content, publish_time, source, url, pic_url) VALUES
(#{item.crawlerId}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.publishTime}, #{item.source}, #{item.url}, #{item.picUrl})
mapper.select: select n.user_id,n.title,n.content,n.create_time from news_data_none n join crawler_none c on n.user_id = c.crawler_id where c.crawler_id = #{crawlerId}
